modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about items to bring and restrictions for dorm living

full_description_text:  
I am preparing to move into the dorms and I have some questions. Specifically, I would like to know what items I should bring with me to the dorms. Additionally, I am unsure about what items are not allowed in the dorms. Any guidance on this would be greatly appreciated.
short_description: Inquiry about items to bring and restrictions for dorm living
description: I am preparing to move into the dorms and I have some questions. Specifically, I would like to know what items I should bring with me to the dorms. Additionally, I am unsure about what items are not allowed in the dorms. Any guidance on this would be greatly appreciated.
